mapper.select:
SELECT b.*, m.member_id, m.name FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_no = m.NO WHERE b.board_type = 'FREE' AND b.is_deleted = 'N'
AND b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY b.no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{amount} ROWS ONLY
SELECT b.*, m.member_id, m.name FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_no = m.no WHERE b.no = #{no} AND b.is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET hit = hit + 1 WHERE no = #{no} AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (no, member_no, board_type, category, title, content, rating, taste_rating, facility_rating, service_rating, hit, like_count, regdate) VALUES (board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, 'FREE', #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{rating}, #{tasteRating}, #{facilityRating}, #{serviceRating}, 0, 0, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, rating = #{rating}, taste_rating = #{tasteRating}, facility_rating = #{facilityRating}, service_rating = #{serviceRating}, update_date = SYSDATE WHERE no = #{no} AND member_no = #{memberNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b WHERE b.board_type = 'FREE' AND b.is_deleted = 'N'
AND b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT b.no, b.board_type, b.title, b.regdate, m.name FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_no = m.no WHERE b.board_type IN ('FREE', 'REVIEW') AND b.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY b.no DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET is_deleted = 'Y', update_date = SYSDATE WHERE no = #{no}
